name: WEN Acquisition Corp
business: WEN Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a business combination with one or more businesses. It has generated no operating revenues and focuses on infrastructure companies in the financial technology sector that enable digital assets through blockchain networks.

exposures.sentence: We are concentrating our efforts on infrastructure companies in the financial technology ( fintech ) sector that are focused on enablement of digital assets, such as stablecoins, through the incorporation and integration of blockchain networks into the traditional financial systems.

catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) May 19, 2027, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
